preflight.note: off-camera: open Settings to stage the persisted settings sidebar preferences

off-camera: the page loads sidebar-collapsed then JS applies the profile persisted preference (~1-2s later). Settle before the railToggle normalization so the unless-check + press act on the settled state (a blind early click can over-toggle an already-expanded sidebar and fail its sidebarExpanded postcondition).
off-camera: expand the settings rail panel so labels and submenus are readable
off-camera: collapse the persisted General group so step 5 expands it on camera
off-camera: collapse the persisted Analytics group so step 11's reveal is genuine
off-camera: return to the app so the take begins on command-center
